response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of polyglot full-stack experience, with recent hands-on TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and re:cinq that directly maps to the primary stack. His current role explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which satisfies the increasingly rare 'AI agent development' requirement. He has a demonstrated culture of testing (TDD advocacy, authored a D test runner and assertion library) and has worked with AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience and no direct mention of Vitest or Playwright — though his testing depth makes framework ramp-up low-risk.
strengths: Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq aligns with the rare AI agent development requirement
Long, continuous TypeScript/Node.js/React track record across multiple production companies (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq) with AWS CDK, MongoDB, and Docker/Kubernetes exposure
Deep testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored open-source test frameworks, ran public workshops — directly supports the Vitest/quality-focus mandate
concerns: Nest.js is the listed backend framework but is absent from the resume; candidate may need ramp-up time on its DI/module patterns
Kotlin is listed as a secondary requirement and is not mentioned anywhere in the resume or skills section
Current role started April 2025 (very recent); depth of production TypeScript work at re:cinq is difficult to assess from the description alone
